title: PDF Pagination Engine
tagline: Intelligent document pagination with orphan prevention
description: A JavaScript-native pagination system that measures actual rendered element heights, groups headings with their content atomically, enforces minimum page-fill (30%), and assembles multi-section documents (cover, content, appendix, back-cover). No wkhtmltopdf. No fragile CSS workarounds. Pure DOM measurement.

title: Moddable Chess Engine
tagline: 70 variants. Consumer game SDK. AI with opening books. Plugin system.
description: A modular chess engine and consumer game framework supporting 70 playable variants on boards from 4x8 to 12x8. Zero dependencies, pure JavaScript. Multi-depth AI with opening books and variant-aware evaluation. Consumer SDK (v0.7.0): createGameController(), createReplay(), renderer extension hooks (tilePainter, pieceProvider), unit templates, and terrain predicates. Dungeon Chess runs entirely on MCE as a game subsystem — proving the framework architecture.

title: Moddable Hexmaps
tagline: Seeded procedural hex maps with JSON export
description: A shared hexagonal map framework for board game tools. Generates, renders, and edits hex-based boards with seeded RNG for reproducible maps. Multiple terrain palettes, click-to-edit, JSON export/import, and full URL parameter API for embedding.
